title: Eva and Deathstar Tattoo on the same girl
display_title: Eva and Deathstar Tattoo on the same girl
wikitext:
[]: Eva and Deathstar Tattoo on the same .. girl ?             Quote Post by Armitage » Sun Dec 13, 2009 3:35 am Was looking through my favourite blog recently and found this entry: http://www.geekologie.com/2009/12/sure_why_not_great_place_for_a.php Hmm ... I wonder who she is XD

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Sun Dec 13, 2009 12:39 pm Wow, I wanna go to her darkside HA its a pun!

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sun Dec 13, 2009 2:49 pm She has a lot of tattoos.

[]:             Quote Post by i_Love_Asuka » Sun Dec 13, 2009 5:59 pm let's just hope she keeps her good shape or else that deathstar-tattoo on her belly is going to look like... well... myeh

[]: Re: Eva and Deathstar Tattoo on the same .. girl ?             Quote Post by DIDDY » Sun Dec 13, 2009 8:29 pm Armitage wrote: Hmm ... I wonder who she is XD

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Sun Dec 13, 2009 8:34 pm Tattoos, piercings, Star Wars AND Eva? I think I'm in love.

[]:             Quote Post by Hexon.Arq » Sun Dec 13, 2009 8:38 pm Was there some sort of worldwide directive that mandated all young women pierce their bellybuttons? What is the appeal of this that it is so widespread, I wonder? Is it supposed to be attractive? Symbolic? They certainly do not SMELL appealing...

[]: Re: Eva and Deathstar Tattoo on the same .. girl ?             Quote Post by Merridian » Mon Dec 14, 2009 1:03 am DIDDY wrote: Comment #27 has a link to a full body picture.

[]:             Quote Post by Uriel Septim VII » Mon Dec 14, 2009 2:13 am i_Love_Asuka wrote: let's just hope she keeps her good shape or else that deathstar-tattoo on her belly is going to look like... well... myeh

[]:             Quote Post by Otakon 08 Ikari » Mon Dec 14, 2009 2:59 am I met a girl at a con with an Eva tattoo, she was awesome.

[]:             Quote Post by Soljer13 » Wed Dec 16, 2009 7:37 am Uriel Septim VII wrote: i_Love_Asuka wrote: let's just hope she keeps her good shape or else that deathstar-tattoo on her belly is going to look like... well... myeh

[]:             Quote Post by Xard » Wed Dec 16, 2009 7:55 am looks like random porn star with geeky tattoos in order to milk (durrrrrrr) geeks off their moneyz
